title: Irish Potato Gratin
description: A rich and comforting Irish-inspired potato gratin that's perfect for a chilly evening. The intense, dense flavors of this dish will warm your heart and belly.

ingredients.name: Granon cheese
ingredients.notes: Irish cheddar or similar can be used

instructions: Butter a 9x13 inch baking dish and set aside.
Slice potatoes thinly and layer in the baking dish.
In a saucepan, combine heavy cream, grated cheese, salt, and pepper. Heat over medium heat, stirring until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth.
Pour the cream mixture over the potatoes and smooth the top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
